passphraseSubtitle: Enter your sync passphrase to encrypt data before it reaches the server
passphraseHint: You signed in with a passkey. Enter the sync passphrase you set on your first device. If this is your first device, choose any passphrase — you'll need it on future devices.
passphraseError: Failed to set sync passphrase. Please try again.
passphrasePrivacy: The passphrase never leaves your device. Your data is encrypted locally before syncing.

devices.notConnected: Connect to a team server to manage synced devices.

pairing.title: Add a sync device
pairing.chooseModeHint: Choose whether this is the trusted device generating the code, or the new device redeeming one.
pairing.showCodeDesc: This is a trusted device — generate a code for the new one to scan or type.
pairing.enterCodeDesc: This is the new device — enter the code shown on a trusted device.
pairing.showCodeHint: Scan the QR code or type the code on the new device. Expires in 10 minutes.
pairing.enterCodeHint: Enter the 8-character code shown on your trusted device.
pairing.invalidCode: Invalid or expired pairing code. Please try again.

enrollment.pendingDesc: This device is waiting for approval before it can sync. On a trusted device, go to Settings → Synced Devices and generate a pairing code.
enrollment.revokedDesc: This device has been removed from the sync group. Contact the account owner or pair again from Settings.
enrollment.notRegisteredDesc: This device has not joined the encrypted sync group yet.
